founder.name: Brooklyn James
founder.bio: Brooklyn founded Aviara with a passion for creating spaces that feel both elevated and inviting, where thoughtful design meets intentional strategy. With a background in hospitality and luxury client experience, she brings a refined eye and a deeply human approach to every home Aviara touches.

members.name: Dre James
members.bio: Brooklyn’s husband and Aviara’s right hand on every install. Dre is the muscle behind the scenes — handling inventory, heavy lifting, logistics, and transportation with precision and care. From protecting the home during move-ins to keeping installs running smoothly and on schedule, he plays a major role in bringing every staging project to life.

members.name: Darren DiMarco
members.bio: Brooklyn’s brother and an essential part of the Aviara team both on and off install day. From assisting with staging logistics and keeping inventory organized to helping manage the technical and behind-the-scenes side of the business, he helps keep everything running smoothly.
